text: I thought it did a wonderful job responding to some previous cricitisms we've leveled here even though that is not the goal. In particular, the goal is not to eliminate screens altogether. Instead, it observes that we have tons of progress on private computation but next to no progress on public computation. Screens fundamentally get in the way there. Now it all makes sense to me.

text: We're still looking for 2 people who want to present/demo something about their project at our next FoC meetup the 28th of May (see earlier message). Who's up for it?

text: Sign me up! I can do a short demo on the USB HID interface.
